payload.title: Task 1514 executed: task-lifecycle-kernel TypeScript migration task family created
payload.summary: Executed task 1514 by creating and verifying the ordered task family for migrating packages/task-lifecycle-kernel from .mjs to TypeScript and splitting large files. The currently exposed MCP facade did not provide a governed task close/report command, so this observation records completion evidence without mutating task lifecycle closure state.
